source_detail: Material use: Construction/Wood primary material production minus re-used, converted from kgCO2e/tonne to kgCO2e/kg
notes: Used as a reuse/second-life proxy, not a full comparative LCA.

source_detail: Waste disposal: Construction/Wood closed-loop, converted from kgCO2e/tonne to kgCO2e/kg
notes: Represents disposal processing emissions, not avoided virgin production credit.

source_detail: Waste disposal: Construction/Wood incineration with energy recovery, converted from kgCO2e/tonne to kgCO2e/kg
notes: Scenario name follows UK factor wording.

source_detail: Waste disposal: Construction/Wood landfill, converted from kgCO2e/tonne to kgCO2e/kg
notes: High value reflects biogenic carbon/methane assumptions in factor source.
